inputs.label: Total Items (n)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of distinct items to choose from.

inputs.label: Selected Items (r)
inputs.businessContext: Number of items to select and arrange.

formulas.permutations: n >= r ? (function factorial(x) { return x <= 1 ? 1 : x * factorial(x - 1); })(n) / (function factorial(x) { return x <= 1 ? 1 : x * factorial(x - 1); })(n - r) : 0
formulas.circularPermutations: n >= 1 ? (function factorial(x) { return x <= 1 ? 1 : x * factorial(x - 1); })(n - 1) : 0
